title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: July 25, 2024
summary: July 25, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to decrease this week at a greater rate of 10.90% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 10.49%), from the level on 07/17/2024 of 7.644 M km 2 to 6.811 M km 2 for this week. This is the second double digit percentage weekly sea ice loss in a row....

title: Petersburg resident wins lawsuit against the borough over unfilled records request
summary: Petersburg’s downtown Trial Court Office. (Photo by Shelby Herbert/KFSK) The Petersburg Borough is being sued by a resident over a request for documents related to a harassment claim the local police chief filed against the borough two years ago. A superior court judge has decided mostly in favor of the resident. Petersburg resident...
